title: Subagent handover envelope
description: Mandatory envelope at the top of every skill-loading subagent return. Pairs the return with its in-flight registry entry.

role.description: Role slug, kebab-case. May include a journey suffix (e.g. composer-j-<slug>).

cycle.description: Cycle number within the role's dispatch loop.

status.description: Role-specific terminal-or-continuation status. Constrained by each role's schema.
